name: strategic decision quality bias review
query: Product leader: we need a strategic decision making quality review before choosing whether to pivot our AI workflow product. Check bounded rationality, System 1 versus System 2, base rates, anchoring, framing, confirmation bias, sunk cost, and what evidence would change the decision.

name: innovation decision heuristic design
query: Founder: create tailored decision heuristics and simple rules for our innovation bets so we know when to continue, pivot, stop, or gather more evidence in a noisy uncertain market.

name: visual decision making review
query: CPO: review this executive dashboard for visual decision bias before the leadership team cuts onboarding scope. Look for misleading chart emphasis, visual overconfidence, graph validity, hidden alternatives, and visual anchoring.

name: group decision quality review
query: Product leader: design the group decision process for our roadmap committee. I worry about groupthink, group polarization, conformity bias, authority bias, common information effect, lack of dissent, and no private voting.

name: role identity decision making map
query: CPO: map how role identity, logic of appropriateness, organizational identity, in-group/out-group dynamics, and role pressure are shaping this cross-functional product decision.
